reference_hypothesis: Normalized 10-day price momentum multiplied by 20-day volume Z-score predicts 5-day forward return.

probe_result.signal: The interaction between price momentum and volume confirmation as a predictor of short-term returns.
probe_result.features: Price momentum over a 10-day period and volume growth over the same period.

parsed.signal: The interaction between price momentum and volume confirmation as a predictor of short-term returns.
parsed.features: Price momentum over a 10-day period and volume growth over the same period.
